prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for formaldehyde (H2C=O) at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, via PySCF (exact four-centre integrals, no density fitting). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, used as-is. Mulliken partial charges used. Neutral (singlet), cation (doublet, charge +1), and anion (doublet, charge -1) SCFs all converged. integrity.trustworthy = true. No engine warnings. Key results: most electrophilic site = C (atom 2), f+ = 0.70839; most nucleophilic site = O (atom 1), f- = 0.46742. Dual descriptor for C = +0.59595 (electrophile-dominant). Headline value reported is f+ for the most electrophilic atom (carbonyl carbon). The engine's warnings array is empty — clean run.
